message:
plugins: drop duplicate .mcp.json wires from rulake-core + rulake-memory

User reported plugin-load warnings:

  ✘ Plugin errors (4 detected):
   ├ plugin:rulake-core:rulake [rulake-core]: MCP server "rulake"
     skipped — same command/URL as server provided by plugin
     "rulake-stack"
   ├ plugin:rulake-substrates:rvdna-mcp [...]: skipped — same as
     rulake-stack
   ├ plugin:rulake-substrates:ruqu-mcp [...]: skipped — same as
     rulake-stack
   └ rulake-substrates@rulake-marketplace: Plugin not found in
     marketplace rulake-marketplace

The first error is structural: rulake-core ships .mcp.json with
{ "rulake": ... } — same server name + URL as rulake-stack's. When
both are installed, Claude Code dedupes and warns. rulake-memory had
the same issue (duplicate `rulake` wire).

The other 3 errors are about an orphaned local install of the
rulake-substrates plugin (which was removed from the catalog when
substrates split into rulake-rvdna + rulake-ruqu). Operator action
required to clear:

  /plugin uninstall rulake-substrates@rulake-marketplace

Fix in this push (clears error #1):
- rulake-core: drop .mcp.json. Now command-only. Operator either
  installs rulake-stack (which bundles the wire) or adds the
  `rulake` MCP server to their ~/.claude.json global config.
  Bumped to v2.3.0-alpha.3.
- rulake-memory: drop .mcp.json. Same shape, same reason.
  Bumped to v0.1.1.
- README sections for both plugins updated to walk the three
  install options (rulake-stack | global config | production
  stdio) so the trade-off is visible.

Net: clean install with no plugin-load warnings is now:

  /plugin install rulake-stack@rulake-marketplace      # killer path,
                                                       # wires bundled
  OR
  /plugin install rulake-rvdna@rulake-marketplace      # a-la-carte
  /plugin install rulake-ruqu@rulake-marketplace
  + add `rulake` MCP to ~/.claude.json yourself

Mixing rulake-stack with rvdna or ruqu individual plugins still
emits informational dedupe warnings (same rvdna-mcp / ruqu-mcp
server name in both); we accept those as the cost of supporting
both install paths.

Co-Authored-By: claude-flow <ruv@ruv.net>

Wires to the live Cloud Run demo by default; switch to stdio for production.",

+  "description": "Commands for the eight rulake_* MCP tools plus /rulake-query and /rulake-discover. v2.3.0-alpha.3 drops the bundled .mcp.json — install rulake-stack for the wire, OR add the rulake MCP to your global Claude Code config. Avoids URL collision when both rulake-core and rulake-stack are installed.",

@@ -15,13 +15,28 @@ The load-bearing plugin: the witness-anchored cache and the eight `rulake_*` MCP
 | `rulake_warm_from_dir` | admin | Restore from disk |
 | `rulake_invalidate_cache` | admin | Drop pointer (substrate forget) |
 
-## Default wire
+## How to wire the MCP
+
+`rulake-core` ships **commands only** (no bundled `.mcp.json`). Pick one of:
+
+**Option 1 — install `rulake-stack`** (recommended, includes the wire):
+
+```text
+/plugin install rulake-stack@rulake-marketplace
+```
+
+**Option 2 — add the wire to your global Claude Code config**:
 
 ```json
-{ "rulake": { "type": "http", "url": "https://rulake-mcp.ruv.io/" } }
+// ~/.claude.json
+{
+  "mcpServers": {
+    "rulake": { "type": "http", "url": "https://rulake-mcp.ruv.io/" }
+  }
+}
 ```
 
-Public demo. Read-only, no auth. For production, switch to stdio:
+**Option 3 — production stdio**:
 
 ```json
 {
@@ -33,6 +48,8 @@ Public demo. Read-only, no auth. For production, switch to stdio:
 }
 ```
 
+The reason `rulake-core` doesn't bundle the wire: when both `rulake-core` and `rulake-stack` are installed, Claude Code dedupes the duplicate `rulake` MCP server name and emits a warning. Cleaner to source the wire from one place.
+
 ## Skills
 
 - `/rulake-query` — the recommended entry point; wraps `rulake_query` with intent + freshness budget defaults

@@ -47,9 +47,13 @@ This plugin also ships a [`memory`](skills/memory/SKILL.md) skill that Claude ca
 | `rulake-rvdna`, `rulake-ruqu` | If installed, the memory surface federates over them too — recall a quantum simulation result by witness, remember a genomic search by region. |
 | `rulake-loop-vector` | The memory plugin's `/memory-tune` recommendations can be wired into a `/loop` worker for continuous auto-tuning. |
 
-## Production deploy
+## How to wire the MCP
 
-Defaults to the public demo MCP at `https://rulake-mcp.ruv.io/` (read-only). For production with real data, deploy your own MCP per [`docs/deploy/cloud-run.md`](../../docs/deploy/cloud-run.md) and override the URL in `.mcp.json`.
+`rulake-memory` ships **commands only** (no bundled `.mcp.json`) — same shape as `rulake-core`, for the same reason: when both this plugin and `rulake-stack` are installed, the duplicate `rulake` MCP server name would emit a warning. Pick one of:
+
+- **Install `rulake-stack`** (recommended) — bundles the wire
+- Add the `rulake` MCP server to your `~/.claude.json` global config
+- For production: deploy your own MCP per [`docs/deploy/cloud-run.md`](../../docs/deploy/cloud-run.md) and point your config at it
 
 ## See also
